description: Enable Picture-in-Picture (PiP) mode for the 'PlayerActivity' in the StreamFlix app. The app currently stops playback when the user leaves the activity; it should instead automatically enter PiP mode with a 16:9 aspect ratio. Ensure the activity handles the transition without restarting and that the 'closeButton' (ID: closeButton) is hidden during PiP mode and visible otherwise. Ensure the project builds successfully.
